details.test: Task 1: Cheapest SUV full-body color change under $2000
Task 2: Earliest Saturday 9-11 AM racing stripes booking for coupe
Task 3: Two-tone red/black gloss configuration under $1800 and save
Task 4: Apply full-body color change promo code over $1200
Task 5: Compare standard vs ceramic clear coat and choose longest warranty
Task 6: Highest-rated location within 20 miles of ZIP 90001
Task 7: Submit fleet color-matching contact inquiry (5+ vehicles)
Task 8: Save matte black/gray gallery items to favorites
